generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4, PCB, PowerSupply, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Insulated container with air volume of 0.03 m³"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs to handle 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with airflow rate of 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for safe actuation control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for heating and cooling components"
]

instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (64-bit serial code), measuring range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData1
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (64-bit serial code), measuring range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData2
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (64-bit serial code), measuring range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy 0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData3
]

instance TemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1
]

instance TemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor2
]

instance TemperatureData3 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from three DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData1, TemperatureData2, TemperatureData3
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares calibration and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, StateEstimationService
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, MonitoringService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService, RealTimeControlService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for hardware and software specifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, MonitoringService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService, RealTimeControlService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates thermal behavior for temperature prediction and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight, OptimizationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system for safety and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight, OptimizationInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates system state using calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults using model-based simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance RealTimeControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time control of heatbed and fan using model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedActuationAction, FanActuationAction
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model-based temperature predictions for system control"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of heating and airflow based on simulations"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety alert for abnormal temperature conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies in thermal system behavior"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated state of the thermal system for control purposes"
]

instance HeatbedActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control actuation of heatbed based on model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control actuation of fan based on model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes hardware actuation through MOSFETs and optocouplers based on control logic."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ server (on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and simulation models; information flow between physical twin and digital twin occurs via RabbitMQ messages as depicted in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin integrates post-deployment, covering the 'as operated' phase of the physical twin's lifecycle, as models are maintained and updated during operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B better predicts thermal inertia of heatbed; validation via sensor experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity tests with three sensors); residual error minimized through non-linear least squares calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication; Raspberry Pi uses built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth for network connectivity; 1-Wire bus for sensor communication with GPIO."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital twin components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with RabbitMQ server running locally on the same device for synchronization and communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol for device safety; optocouplers decouple control signals from Raspberry Pi to MOSFETs for electrical isolation; no explicit cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
